findings.problem: The docs-first review bundle is missing a file that the change artifacts themselves declare as part of the mandatory docs-first review surface, so this checkpoint cannot be treated as complete and exhaustive.
findings.evidence: Tasks require the artifact-completion docs-first input to include `.codex/agents/verify-reviewer.toml` alongside `proposal/specs/design/tasks`, shared verification contracts, and `CALLER-INTEGRATION.md` (tasks.md:48-51). The design also declares `.codex/agents/verify-reviewer.toml` as the verifier agent path for these checkpoints (design.md:353-356). The provided `evidence_paths_or_diff_scope` omits `/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/.codex/agents/verify-reviewer.toml`.
findings.recommendation: Add `/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/.codex/agents/verify-reviewer.toml` to the docs-first review surface, then rerun the artifact-completion review so coverage can be complete and exhaustive.

findings.problem: The source-first checkpoint plan is internally inconsistent between `design.md` and `tasks.md`, which makes the review sequence and authoritative output paths ambiguous.
findings.evidence: The design defines source-first checkpoint-1 as reference-alignment extraction, checkpoint-2 as perception/scene-state, checkpoint-3 as steering control/runtime integration, and checkpoint-4 as final fixture and non-regression proof (design.md:389-396). The tasks instead label perception/scene-state as checkpoint-1 (tasks.md:55-58), steering-control/runtime integration as checkpoint-2 (tasks.md:62-65), then require final review artifacts in checkpoint-3 and checkpoint-4 paths without an explicit checkpoint-3 task definition (tasks.md:69-72).
findings.recommendation: Make `tasks.md` and `design.md` use the same checkpoint numbering and surfaces. Either add the missing explicit checkpoint-3 task and keep the design numbering, or renumber the design/tasks consistently so each checkpoint has one clear surface and one authoritative output path.
